scripts.build:contracts: forge build src/AGCToken.sol src/StabilityVault.sol src/RewardDistributor.sol src/SettlementRouter.sol src/PolicyEngine.sol src/AGCHook.sol && forge build src/PolicyController.sol --via-ir
scripts.test: pnpm test:agchook && pnpm test:reward && pnpm test:router && pnpm test:policy && pnpm test:service
scripts.test:gas: forge test --match-path test/agchook/AGCHook.t.sol --skip PolicyController.sol --gas-report --offline && forge test --match-path test/reward/RewardDistributor.t.sol --skip AGCHook.sol --skip PolicyController.sol --gas-report --offline --via-ir && forge test --match-path test/router/SettlementRouter.t.sol --skip AGCHook.sol --skip PolicyController.sol --gas-report --offline --via-ir && forge test --match-path test/policy/PolicyController.t.sol --skip AGCHook.sol --gas-report --offline --via-ir
